entities.name: STAPLE CROPS
entities.description: Crops that form the basis of the food supply for most people.

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of crops through agronomic practices, plant breeding, or biotechnology.

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: The micronutrient iron (Fe) content in plant samples.

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: The micronutrient zinc (Zn) content in plant samples.

entities.name: IRON AND ZINC DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutritional deficiency in food caused by lack of iron and zinc.

entities.name: COLORIMETRY
entities.description: An analytical technique used for micronutrient analysis based on color change.

entities.name: ATOMIC ABSORPTION SPECTROPHOTOMETRY
entities.description: An analytical technique (AAS) used for quantifying micronutrients in plant samples.

entities.name: INDUCTIVELY COUPLED PLASMA OPTICAL EMISSION SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: An analytical technique (ICP-OES) used for quantifying micronutrients in plant samples.

entities.name: X-RAY FLUORESCENCE SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: A nondestructive analytical technique (XRF) used for efficient and economical screening of micronutrients.

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of quantifying micronutrients like iron and zinc in plant samples.

entities.name: PLANT SAMPLES
entities.description: Biological samples derived from plants used for nutrient analysis.

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: Different genetic makeups of an organism used in breeding programs.

entities.name: BREEDING MATERIALS
entities.description: Plant materials used in breeding programs for biofortification.

entities.name: GENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material of an organism.
